title: Maple Memo: Addressing the Unique tier Familiar Boss Damage Potential
original_title: Maple Memo: Addressing the Unique tier Familiar Boss Damage Potential
author: Global MapleStory
summary: Global MapleStory confirmed that Unique-tier Familiar Potential will keep only the 40% Boss Damage result at its current appearance rate. The team found that both the former 30% and 35% results had been removed, rather than only the intended 30% result.

images.alt: Maple Memo: Addressing the Unique tier Familiar Boss Damage Potential

sections.title: Decision
items: Only the 40% Boss Damage option will remain at Unique tier in Familiar Potential.
Its appearance rate will remain unchanged from the rate in effect when the notice was published.

sections.title: What Nexon found
items: Before v.264, Unique-tier Boss Damage could roll 30%, 35%, or 40%.
The intended quality-of-life change was to remove 30%, but the review found that 35% had also been removed.
Nexon said other Familiar Potential options, tiers, and rank-up values were working as intended.
